title: honor libpod.conf in /usr/share/containers
body:
we should be looking for the libpod.conf file in /usr/share/containers
and not in /usr/local.  packages of podman should drop the default
libpod.conf in /usr/share.  the override remains /etc/containers/ as
well.

Fixes: #3702

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

Tagging for 1.5.0, we want this in for the release so we don't regress

Might be but not necessarily related to this PR.

Man podman seems to document this fairly well.
